notes: Shopify store (private-label Primo brand + reseller of mainstream infection-control / instrument lines: Crosstex, PDI, Halyard Health, 3M, Medicom, Cranberry, Tribest, etc.). Reuses the generic Shopify adapter (adapters/shopify.ts): variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price -> price, variant.available -> stock. Small, complete catalog pulled in full from /products.json?limit=250&page=1 (199 products, single page; page 2 empty). SKU+brand matching only; variant.barcode empty across all 502 variants (no GTIN/UPC, so no lot/expiry barcode hook), same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. No bot protection observed (plain UA gets 200 JSON). Net32 winning seller (261 wins). Verified live 2026-07-01: products.json 200, Primo Powder Free Nitrile Gloves (sku 101-NG100XS, Primo) = $12.49, 0/502 variants carried a barcode.
